lea:title: The Pitch Science Fiction 2024
lea:author: Eduard Pech
lea:description: The Pitch Science Fiction is a quarterly publication of science fiction stories by various authors, covering diverse themes. Included in this issue: Table Of Contents Plain
lea:rights: All texts and illustrations not explicitly declared as being in the public domain are copyright 2024 by Eduard Pech or by their respective authors. The complete edition is (C) 2024 by Logophilia. Logophilia is an imprint of Logophilia OÜ.
lea:text: About the Content.xhtml
Table of Contents by Authors.xhtml
Table of Contents by Blurbs.xhtml
Table of Contents by Era.xhtml
Out of the Iron Womb! by Poul Anderson.xhtml
Youth by Isaac Asimov.xhtml
Last Call from Sector 9G by Leigh Brackett.xhtml
The Monster Maker by Ray Bradbury.xhtml
The Hanging Stranger by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
Tongues of the Moon by Philip Jose Farmer.xhtml
The Fifth-Dimension Tube by Murray Leinster.xhtml
The Game of Rat and Dragon by Cordwainer Smith.xhtml
The Vortex Blaster by E. E. Smith.xhtml
Sjambak by Jack Vance.xhtml
The Star-Stealers by Edmond Hamilton.xhtml
A Pail of Air by Fritz Leiber.xhtml
The Eyes Have It by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
Contagion by Katherine MacLean.xhtml
Let's Get Together by Isaac Asimov.xhtml
The Big Trip Up Yonder by Kurt Vonnegut, Jr.xhtml
Lorelei of the Red Mist by Leigh Brackett and Ray Bradbury.xhtml
The Last Evolution by John W. Campbell, Jr.xhtml
The Poison Belt by Arthur Conan Doyle.xhtml
Try to Remember! by Frank Herbert.xhtml
The Tunnel Under the World by Frederik Pohl.xhtml
Cosmic Striptease by Harlan Ellison.xhtml
I, Gardener by Allen Kim Lang.xhtml
Scanners Live in Vain by Cordwainer Smith.xhtml
The Scarlet Plague by Jack London.xhtml
Second Variety by Philip K. Dick.xhtml
Pygmalion's Spectacles by Stanley G. Weinbaum.xhtml
The Colour out of Space by H. P. Lovecraft.xhtml
The Second Shell by Jack Williamson.xhtml
The Invisible Master by Edmond Hamilton.xhtml
2 B R 0 2 B by Kurt Vonnegut, Jr..xhtml
